name: ng-hub-ui-icons
description: Icon-set-agnostic Angular icon component and directive — render Font Awesome, Bootstrap Icons, Material Symbols, Solar or your own SVGs through one API, with no hard dependency on any icon pack. Part of the ng-hub-ui ecosystem.
author: Carlos Morcillo <carlos.morcillo@me.com> (https://www.carlosmorcillo.com)
